channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 3 Conditions That Are Linked To Cognitive Decline (But Aren't Dementia)
item.description: Your memory loss could be something else.

item.title: The Dow transports’ steep takeoff isn’t the green light you’re told it is
item.description: The S&P 500 does better when the Dow industrials outperform the Dow transports.

item.title: Rihanna Accidentally Flashes Butt While Walking into A$AP Rocky's Fashion Show
item.description: Rihanna went to support A$AP Rocky's fashion pursuits ... but her outfit gained the most attention when she accidentally flashed her backside. The sin...

item.title: India doubles down on state-backed venture capital, approving $1.1B fund
item.description: India’s $1.1B fund-of-funds will invest through private VCs to support deep-tech and manufacturing startups.

item.title: Justina Valentine Fire-Hot Snaps to Celebrate Her 39th Birthday
item.description: Justina Valentine is 39 and looking great ... and if you need receipts, this gallery’s got 'em! The birthday babe knows exactly how to crank up the he...

item.title: Huge offer: Limited-time 40% transfer bonus from Chase to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club
item.description: Act now: Chase is offering a 40% limited-time transfer bonus to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club. Score business-class seats for just 21,000 points.

item.title: This iconic ski-in, ski-out points hotel in Colorado just refreshed its rooms. We took a look inside
item.description: Come with us inside the ski-in, ski-out Park Hyatt Beaver Creek as we check out its renovated rooms.

item.title: Canadian Curler Cusses Out Swedish Opponent After Cheating Accusations, Video
item.description: Canadians might generally be known for their polite manners, but those apparently didn't travel with one curling competitor to Milan for the Winter Ol...

item.title: Research Finds Men & Women Don't Know What The Other Finds Attractive
item.description: Our perceptions about what potential partners find attractive may be way off.

item.title: Social Security could run out of money in just 6 years — even sooner than originally feared
item.description: Higher inflation and lower income taxes on benefits may weigh on the program’s trust funds.

item.title: There's A New Moon Solar Eclipse Headed Our Way—Here's What To Know
item.description: It's in Aquarius.

item.title: Designer Kate Barton teams up with IBM and Fiducia AI for a NYFW presentation
item.description: Designer Kate Barton teams up with Fiducia AI and IBM for a NYFW presentation.

item.title: 5 reasons to get Chase's Ink Business Preferred Credit Card
item.description: Plenty of benefits make Chase's Ink Business Preferred Credit Card worth considering, from a high welcome bonus to strong coverage for travel and car ...

item.title: The Year Of The Fire Horse Begins This Week—Here's Your Horoscope
item.description: Pisces season is here!

item.title: Travis Kelce's Podcast Account Posts Valentine's Day Card Referencing Taylor Swift's 'Wood'
item.description: Travis Kelce's love was the key that opened Taylor Swift's thighs ... and he's looking to pass that on this Valentine's Day in the form of a virtual c...

item.title: Hollywood isn’t happy about the new Seedance 2.0 video generator
item.description: Hollywood organizations are pushing back against a new AI video model called Seedance 2.0, which they say has quickly become a tool for “blatant” copy...

item.title: TSA officers to work without pay as government (partially) shuts down again
item.description: Well, here we go again. Travelers heading to the airport face a new round of uncertainty after part of the federal government shut down.

item.title: Spirit Airlines launches new inflight trading cards
item.description: Spirit Airlines launched a new set of trading cards featuring its historic and current fleet and liveries. The new cards are only available on Spirit ...

item.title: I’m An RD In My 30s & This Is The Supplement I Take For Hydrated, Bouncier Skin
item.description: It's also given me a more even complexion.*

item.title: In a changed VC landscape, this exec is doubling down on overlooked founders
item.description: As much of Silicon Valley chases mega-rounds and buzzy AI deals, Stacy Brown-Philpot is running Cherryrock Capital like a throwback to venture capital...

item.title: Tempted to use buy-now-pay-later to split your rent payments? Watch out for these fees.
item.description: Want to pay rent in two installments instead of one? The fine print can make “0% interest” costlier than it sounds.

item.title: ‘Clueless’ -inspired app Alta partners with brand Public School to start integrating styling tools into websites
item.description: This week, Alta unveiled its first integration collaboration, teaming up with Public School, a storied New York City brand.

item.title: ‘We’ve been dating for 5 years’: My boyfriend’s parents say he doesn’t earn enough to marry. Should I speak to his father?
item.description: “Every year his very wealthy parents say that he needs to ‘earn more’ before he can marry me.”

item.title: Bianca Censori Heads to Spa Ahead of Valentine's Day
item.description: Bianca Censori will look picture-perfect for her hubby Kanye West for Valentine's Day -- 'cause she was out getting a spa touch-up the day before! Che...

item.title: My employer is forcing me into a Roth 401(k). Is there anything I can do?
item.description: High earners have to pay tax on their catch-up 401(k) contributions and deposit them into workplace Roth accounts.
